name: Boboli Aka Focaccia Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons olive oil, plus extra for pans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yeast, 1/4 cup water, 2 1/4 cups warm water, 6 tablespoons olive oil, and enough flour (5 1/2 to 6 cups) with or without salt in a large bowl until a soft dough forms.
2. Allow the dough to rise for 30 to 40 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into three equal parts and place each portion into separate, lightly oiled pie pans.
4. Dimple the dough using your fingers.
5. Sprinkle coarse sea (or Kosher) salt, fresh ground pepper, chopped rosemary and thyme over the dimpled dough. If using dried herbs, soak them in water for 10 minutes, then drain on paper towels before adding to the dough.
6. Let the shaped dough rise for an additional 50 to 60 minutes.
7. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake the focaccia for 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Optionally, dip in olive oil before serving. Enjoy!
